roa.docketEntryComment: FELONY PRELIMINARY
FELONY PRELIMINARY

MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONSTL RTS;PLD G CT1-664/212,5(B)PC/FADM 667(D)(E)PC;CRT MKES FNDGS;REF APD/PSR;CONT 4/5/95 9AM S23 FOR SENTCRT GRTS DA MO STRK REM ALLEGS 667,5(B)PC;DET ADMON IN RE IBARRA/ARBUCKLEDEFT WVS TIME
A/JWV;CT1-SP16M(L)CTS259D;$200RF;ADV PAROLE RTS
TRANSF TO D23 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM ON 3/16/95
CONT TO 3/15/95 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
MARSDEN MO DEN;TO D22 FOR TRL F/W
CONT 3/14/95 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR FUR PTC
CONT TO 3/14/95 FOR TRIAL AT 930 IN D22
MARSDEN MO BY DEFT GRTD MS OGARA;RET TO D22 F/W
APP DEFT WVD;CONT 1/6/95 FOR PTC AT 1030AM IN D22
SEE MINS OF 11/18/94 IN D22
MO CONT-GRTD;DEFT ENT GTW;CONT 12/22/94 FOR PTC AT 1030AM;VAC 11/21/94
MARSDEN MO DEN;TRANSF TO D22 11/21/94 AT 930AM FOR TRIAL/PTC
CONT 11/10/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR FUR PTC
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/STRIKE/TN1//PC:941108/1400/S22/TR:941121/0930/S22
